rationale: The Russia-Ukraine war continues at maximum background intensity; Trump's friction with Israel over Beirut strikes adds uncertainty to US diplomatic bandwidth for Ukraine support.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war continues (active combat)
top_events.summary: Active war on Ukrainian territory continues with no qualitative change this cycle — remains the dominant daily reality for all Ukrainian residents.

top_events.title: Trump says Israeli attacks on Beirut unjustified, puts Iran deal at risk
top_events.summary: Trump's public friction with Israel over Beirut strikes signals US diplomatic attention is divided, which could indirectly reduce focus on Ukraine support — rhetoric only, no confirmed policy shift.

top_events.title: Russian families use AI to 'resurrect' loved ones killed in Ukraine
top_events.summary: A human-interest story about Russian families using AI to recreate deceased soldiers — reflects the scale of Russian casualties but has no direct operational impact on Ukrainian daily life.
